import logging
import time

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def call_api(url, max_retries=3):
    for attempt in range(max_retries):
        try:
            return http_get(url)
        except ConnectionError:
            logger.warning("Request failed, retrying...")
            time.sleep(1)
    logger.error("Request failed permanently")
    return None


def publish_event(event, retries=5):
    for i in range(retries):
        try:
            broker.send(event)
            return True
        except Exception:
            logger.warning("Publish failed")
            time.sleep(0.5)
    logger.error("Publish failed after all retries")
    return False
